description: The Corleone Mafia family is a Cosa Nostra crime family based in Corleone, Sicily, founded around the 1900s by Angelo Gagliano. It rose to become the most powerful mafia family in Italy and the world under Totò Riina, winning the Second Mafia War in the 1980s. After a period of repression in the early 1990s, many members were imprisoned, but the family remains active with about 70 members.
